name: My boss in West Valley City is pressuring me not to file my work injury claim, what now?

mainEntity.name: My boss in West Valley City is pressuring me not to file my work injury claim, what now?

acceptedAnswer.text: File anyway—it's illegal for bosses to interfere; document everything.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: This is unlawful interference in Utah, punishable by fines up to $5,000; report it anyway to protect benefits.[2] Employers can't intimidate or harass to block claims under Utah Code §34A-2-114.[2] Key factors: Document pressure (emails, notes); file independently if needed; retaliation for filing is illegal.[2][5] Practical guidance: Report to HR or Labor Commission, seek medical care, and contact an attorney to safeguard against retaliation. Your rights to benefits remain intact.

description: File anyway—it's illegal for bosses to interfere; document everything.[2]
